data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'deterministic read model rebuild/replay support', but the evidence provided does not confirm that this requirement is met. The linked use case describes the need for this functionality, but there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that the system can successfully replay from the last checkpoint without data loss, which is a critical aspect of the requirement. This leads to a conclusion that there is a gap in the evidence regarding the implementation of this feature.
gaps: No evidence confirming the ability to replay from the last checkpoint without data loss.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
